market_overview.headline: Market remains under pressure with both SPY and QQQ in bearish unstacked formations while BTC shows Full Bear structure.
market_overview.detail: Only 28% of top 300 stocks in Full Bull mode while 32% are Full Bear, suggesting broad-based weakness. However, 8W/13W crossover alerts across major indices hint at potential stabilization attempts.
